				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_2_8c30285_1459417613082_134322_19071' name='(1) Electrostatically charged patient touches infusion pump  (2) ESD (electrostatic discharge) causes  pump and pump alarms to fail  &#10;(3) Insulin not delivered to patient'/>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_19_0beta_9250292_1503302973306_272268_18772' name='Reduced RPN Risk'>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_19_0beta_9250292_1503302973307_248981_18773' name='Critical'>
						<constrainedElement href='FMEA Profile.mdzip#_18_3_8c30285_1453362420392_657028_15057'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='FMEA_profile::Stereotypes::FMEAItem' referentType='Stereotype'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</constrainedElement>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_19_0beta_9250292_1503302973308_438519_18778'>
							<body>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; standalone=&quot;yes&quot;?&gt;
&lt;unionExpressionSpecification ordered=&quot;true&quot; unique=&quot;true&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.nomagic.com/schemas/MagicDraw/StructuredExpression/2013&quot;&gt;
    &lt;taggedValues&gt;
        &lt;entry key=&quot;ROOT_UNION&quot;&gt;
            &lt;value&gt;true&lt;/value&gt;
        &lt;/entry&gt;
        &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
            &lt;value&gt;Condition&lt;/value&gt;
        &lt;/entry&gt;
    &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
    &lt;value xsi:type=&quot;callExpressionSpecification&quot; includeCustomTypes=&quot;false&quot; includeSubtypes=&quot;true&quot; xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;&gt;
        &lt;taggedValues&gt;
            &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
                &lt;value&gt;reducedRPN&amp;gt;40&lt;/value&gt;
            &lt;/entry&gt;
        &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
        &lt;argument xsi:type=&quot;callExpressionSpecification&quot; includeCustomTypes=&quot;true&quot; includeSubtypes=&quot;false&quot;&gt;
            &lt;taggedValues&gt;
                &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;value&gt;Metachain Navigation1&lt;/value&gt;
                &lt;/entry&gt;
            &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
            &lt;argument xsi:type=&quot;lookupExpressionSpecification&quot; symbol=&quot;THIS&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;expression xsi:type=&quot;metaChainExpressionSpecification&quot; ordered=&quot;true&quot; unique=&quot;true&quot; includeCustomTypes=&quot;true&quot; includeSubtypes=&quot;true&quot;&gt;
                &lt;chain xsi:type=&quot;stereotypeProperty&quot; profile=&quot;FMEA_profile&quot; stereotype=&quot;FMEAItem&quot; tag=&quot;reducedRPN&quot; derived=&quot;true&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;property stereotypeId=&quot;_18_3_8c30285_1453362420392_657028_15057&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;propertyValue xsi:type=&quot;propertyName&quot; value=&quot;reducedRPN&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;/property&gt;
                &lt;/chain&gt;
            &lt;/expression&gt;
        &lt;/argument&gt;
        &lt;expression xsi:type=&quot;makeInlineExpressionSpecification&quot; language=&quot;JavaScript Rhino&quot;&gt;
            &lt;parameter name=&quot;arg1&quot; type=&quot;java.lang.Object&quot; ordered=&quot;false&quot; unique=&quot;false&quot; multiple=&quot;false&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;body&gt;arg1.iterator().next() &amp;gt; 40.0&lt;/body&gt;
        &lt;/expression&gt;
    &lt;/value&gt;
&lt;/unionExpressionSpecification&gt;
</body>
							<language>StructuredExpression</language>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_19_0beta_9250292_1503302973308_920417_18774' name='High'>
						<constrainedElement href='FMEA Profile.mdzip#_18_3_8c30285_1453362420392_657028_15057'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
								<referenceExtension referentPath='FMEA_profile::Stereotypes::FMEAItem' referentType='Stereotype'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</constrainedElement>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_19_0beta_9250292_1503302973308_411426_18780'>
							<body>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; standalone=&quot;yes&quot;?&gt;
&lt;unionExpressionSpecification ordered=&quot;true&quot; unique=&quot;true&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.nomagic.com/schemas/MagicDraw/StructuredExpression/2013&quot;&gt;
    &lt;taggedValues&gt;
        &lt;entry key=&quot;ROOT_UNION&quot;&gt;
            &lt;value&gt;true&lt;/value&gt;
        &lt;/entry&gt;
        &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
            &lt;value&gt;Condition&lt;/value&gt;
        &lt;/entry&gt;
    &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
    &lt;value xsi:type=&quot;callExpressionSpecification&quot; includeCustomTypes=&quot;false&quot; includeSubtypes=&quot;true&quot; xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;&gt;
        &lt;taggedValues&gt;
            &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
                &lt;value&gt;15&amp;lt;reducedRPN&amp;lt;40&lt;/value&gt;
            &lt;/entry&gt;
        &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
        &lt;argument xsi:type=&quot;callExpressionSpecification&quot; includeCustomTypes=&quot;true&quot; includeSubtypes=&quot;false&quot;&gt;
            &lt;taggedValues&gt;
                &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;value&gt;Metachain Navigation1&lt;/value&gt;
                &lt;/entry&gt;
            &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
            &lt;argument xsi:type=&quot;lookupExpressionSpecification&quot; symbol=&quot;THIS&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;expression xsi:type=&quot;metaChainExpressionSpecification&quot; ordered=&quot;true&quot; unique=&quot;true&quot; includeCustomTypes=&quot;true&quot; includeSubtypes=&quot;true&quot;&gt;
                &lt;chain xsi:type=&quot;stereotypeProperty&quot; profile=&quot;FMEA_profile&quot; stereotype=&quot;FMEAItem&quot; tag=&quot;reducedRPN&quot; derived=&quot;true&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;property stereotypeId=&quot;_18_3_8c30285_1453362420392_657028_15057&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;propertyValue xsi:type=&quot;propertyName&quot; value=&quot;reducedRPN&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;/property&gt;
                &lt;/chain&gt;
            &lt;/expression&gt;
        &lt;/argument&gt;
        &lt;expression xsi:type=&quot;makeInlineExpressionSpecification&quot; language=&quot;JavaScript Rhino&quot;&gt;
            &lt;parameter name=&quot;arg1&quot; type=&quot;java.lang.Object&quot; ordered=&quot;false&quot; unique=&quot;false&quot; multiple=&quot;false&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;body&gt;arg1.iterator().next() &amp;gt; 15 &amp;amp;&amp;amp; arg1.iterator().next() &amp;lt; 40
&lt;/body&gt;
        &lt;/expression&gt;
    &lt;/value&gt;
&lt;/unionExpressionSpecification&gt;
</body>
							<language>StructuredExpression</language>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>

                &lt;chain xsi:type=&quot;stereotypeProperty&quot; profile=&quot;FMEA_profile&quot; stereotype=&quot;FMEAItem&quot; tag=&quot;reducedRPN&quot; derived=&quot;true&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;property stereotypeId=&quot;_18_3_8c30285_1453362420392_657028_15057&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;propertyValue xsi:type=&quot;propertyName&quot; value=&quot;reducedRPN&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;/property&gt;
                &lt;/chain&gt;

        &lt;expression xsi:type=&quot;makeInlineExpressionSpecification&quot; language=&quot;JavaScript Rhino&quot;&gt;

						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_19_0beta_9250292_1503302973309_583848_18784'>
							<body>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; standalone=&quot;yes&quot;?&gt;

	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_18_0_6_8c30285_1472132792922_674206_19960'>

		<geometry>42, 49, 938, 70</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>Medical FMEA and Hazard Analysis</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_0_6_93d029c_1484823847943_42959_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_18_0_6_8c30285_1472132792925_20738_19967'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='20'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 364, 735, 87</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
The model is based on an &lt;b&gt;Insulin Pump&lt;/b&gt; case study and covers &lt;b&gt;Failure Mode and Effect Analysis&lt;/b&gt; (FMEA) and &lt;b&gt;Hazard Analysis&lt;/b&gt;.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_0_6_93d029c_1484823847943_42959_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_18_0_6_8c30285_1472132792925_921037_19968'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='20'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 273, 735, 87</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
The model demonstrates &lt;b&gt;MagicDraw&lt;/b&gt; and &lt;b&gt;Cameo Safety and Reliability Analyzer&lt;/b&gt; capabilities in building and analysing models.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_0_6_93d029c_1484823847943_42959_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_18_0_6_8c30285_1472132792926_1647_19969'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='20'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 161, 735, 87</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
This model is developed to demonstrate &lt;b&gt;model-based safety and reliability analysis advantages&lt;/b&gt; over document-based approach for a wide audience of Systems Engineers from different domains.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_0_6_93d029c_1484823847943_42959_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
